name: Revival Gold Inc.
description: Revival Gold Inc. is a growth-focused gold exploration and development company. The company is advancing the Beartrack-Arnett Gold Project, located in Idaho, USA. Beartrack-Arnett is the largest past-producing gold mine in Idaho and hosts a significant mineral resource. Revival Gold is focused on expanding this resource and advancing the project through economic studies. In addition to its flagship asset, the company holds interests in other gold exploration properties, maintaining a strong commitment to responsible mining practices and creating value for its shareholders through discovery and development.
